race_meta.race_name: bettingsites.co.uk New Betting Sites Handicap (GBBPlus Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner unexpected winner was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Respond with 30.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Respond > Penzance, but actual result was Unexpected Winner > Respond. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
